Go to the documentation of this file.

00005 #pragma once
00006 #include "sprite/builtins.hpp"
00007 #include "sprite/common.hpp"
00008 #include "sprite/fingerprint.hpp"
00009 #include "sprite/node.hpp"
00010 #include "sprite/program.hpp"
00011 #include "sprite/rewrite.hpp"
00012 
00013 namespace sprite
00014 {
00015   struct Program;
00016 
00018   extern Program const * g_program;
00019 
00020   enum TraceOption { NO_TRACE=false, TRACE=true };
00021 
00028   struct YieldHandler
00029   {
00030     virtual void yield(Node const & result) const = 0;
00031     virtual ~YieldHandler() {}
00032   };
00033 
00039   template<typename OutputIterator>
00040   struct YieldHandler_ : YieldHandler
00041   {
00042     explicit YieldHandler_(OutputIterator out) : m_out(out) {}
00043   private:
00044     OutputIterator m_out;
00045   public:
00046     virtual void yield(Node const & result) const
00047       { *m_out++ = result; }
00048     virtual ~YieldHandler_() {}
00049   };
00050 
00052   template<> struct YieldHandler_<void> : YieldHandler
00053   {
00054     virtual void yield(Node const &) const {}
00055     virtual ~YieldHandler_() {}
00056   };
00057 
00077   void execute(
00078       Program const & program, Node & goal
00079     , YieldHandler const & handler = YieldHandler_<void>()
00080     , TraceOption trace=NO_TRACE
00081     );
00082 
00083   inline void execute(
00084       Program const & program, Node & goal, TraceOption trace
00085     )
00086   { execute(program, goal, YieldHandler_<void>(), trace); }
00087   
00089   template<typename OutputIterator>
00090   inline void execute(
00091       Program const & pgm, Node & goal, OutputIterator out
00092     , TraceOption trace=NO_TRACE
00093     )
00094   {
00095     YieldHandler_<OutputIterator> handler(out);
00096     execute(pgm, goal, static_cast<YieldHandler const &>(handler), trace);
00097   }
00098 
00100   inline bool is_norm(Node const & node)
00101   {
00102     if(!is_ctor(node.tag())) return false;
00103 
00104     BOOST_FOREACH(NodePtr const & child, node.iter())
00105       { if(!is_norm(*child)) return false; }
00106 
00107     return true;
00108   }
00109 
00118   inline void pull_tab(Node & g, NodePtr const & p)
00119   {
00120     size_t const i = g.position(p);
00121     assert(p->tag() == CHOICE);
00122     NodePtr lhs = g.clone();
00123     (*lhs)[i] = (*p)[0];
00124     NodePtr rhs = g.clone();
00125     (*rhs)[i] = (*p)[1];
00126     rewrite_choice(g, p->id(), lhs, rhs);
00127   }
00128 
00135   inline void head_normalize(Node & node)
00136   {
00137     switch(node.tag())
00138     {
00139       case OPER: return g_program->oper[node.id()](node);
00140       case INT:
00141       case FLOAT:
00142       case CTOR: return;
00143       default:
00144         throw RuntimeError(
00145             "defined operation or constructor expected in "
00146               + std::string(BOOST_CURRENT_FUNCTION)
00147           );
00148     }
00149   }
00150 
00151   
00153   inline void fair_normalize(Fingerprint const & fp, Node & node)
00154   {
00155     switch(node.tag())
00156     {
00157       case OPER: return head_normalize(node);
00158       case CTOR:
00159       {
00160         BOOST_FOREACH(NodePtr & child, node.iter())
00161         {
00162           switch(child->tag())
00163           {
00164             case FAIL: rewrite_fail(node); break;
00165             case CTOR: fair_normalize(fp, *child); break;
00166             case OPER: head_normalize(*child); break;
00167             case CHOICE: return pull_tab(node, child);
00168             case INT: case FLOAT: break;
00169             case FWD: throw RuntimeError("Unexpected FWD node.");
00170           }
00171         }
00172         break;
00173       }
00174       case INT: // Always a cnf.
00175       case FLOAT: // Always a cnf.
00176       default:;
00177     }
00178   }
00179 
00185   void print_node(Node const &);
00186 }
